creator: jason@naughton.ca
text:
This WAS posted on  "Fri, 8 Jun 2007 23:03:17 -0400 (EDT)" and was on a supported stable version.  I had moved on to re-install Solaris x86 after the server continuously crashed under load.  I posted the back trace at the time as per the previous commenters request.  The server in question now is powered down as this PR over 3 years old.  It might as well be deleted now...

        Cheers
      
                Jason=
